roa.docketEntryComment: Held to Answer
ORDER SUSPENDING ACTIVE COLLECTIONS, GC 25259,7-25259,95
PET & ORDER TO SUSP FEE PER SFBOS 180132 SIGNED AND FILED
PRELIM TX FILED

/AJW/CH1:ISS:PROB 3 Y:PJ 244D/CTS:244/DNA/290//CTORD:DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO PAY THE AMOUNT OF $500,00 FOR COSTS OF  LEGALASSISTANCE RECEIVED PURSUANT TO PENAL CODE SECTION 987,8//CTORD:DEFENDANT IS NOT TO HAVE UNSUPERVISED CONTACT OF UNRELATED  MINORS ATHIS RESIDENCE, NO INTERNET CHAT ROOM USAGE AND IS ORDERED TO  ATTEND GROUPSEX OFFENDER TREATMENT PUSUANT TO ATSA PROTOCOL AS SUPERVISED BY APD,/CTORD:COMPUTERS SEIZED IN THIS CASE IS HEREBY FORFEITED, AND DEFENDANT'S PROBATION MAY BE TRANSFERRED FROM SAN FRANCISCO TO THE STATE OF IDAHO/VF4:200/PC/PSR/BKFEE/PROBFINE/SECFEE/OBEY/ACCEP/
/CONTD:ON STANDBY/X:REQUEST FOR STAY OF THESE PROCEEDINGS FOR FILING OF WRIT GRANTED TO 11-12-04/LD:12-17-04/
/TEXT:TRANS TO DEPT 28/TRANS 28:FORTHWITH FOR HEARING ON 995PC MOTION//X:LD IS 11-15-04 PER STIPULATION,//X:COURT ADVISES THE ADA THAT DEFT HAS NOT YET COMPLETED ID PROCESSING,/

/MO TO CONT:BY PEOPLE FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON:ADA UNAVAILABLE/    /MO GRTD/GCF/X:PARTIES AGREE TO NEW LAST DATE OF 11-15-04,//VD:TRIAL DATE OF 10-22-04/VD:PRETRIAL DATE OF 10-14-04/ /X:EST 2-WEEK TRIAL,/CONTD:10-07-04 FOR HRG ON 995PC MOTION 0900/
/CAL:BIFURCATED PRELIMINARY HEARING & MOTION TO DISMISS/MO DENIED//TEXT:DEFT IS ORDERED HELD TO ANSWER/HOLDING/HTA1:1/BAIL:100,000/DEFTCUST3/

/WIT SWORN:MARY MERCER//EXHMA:1, INTERNET TRANSCRIPT 2,  WORK PRODUCT 04059  3, W,P,04060 4, WP 04068, 5, WP 04070  6, WP 04081 7,WP 04083 8,WP 04086 9,WP 04092 10,WP 04094 11, WP04091 12 WP 04096 13 E MAIL PRINT OUT 14, EMIL MAY 16 04, 15 PHOTO COPY  1 /BAIL:100000         /D ENTER DISCHARGE CODE 74 ON COUNTS NOT HELD TOANSWER/***IF A PRELIMINARY HEARING IS HELD, DELETE PRELIMNW,***
/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS: 2//FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES:02-04-05/DISM3/
/TEXT:TRANS TO DEPT 28/TRANS 28:FORTHWITH FOR PRETRIAL CONFERENCE//LD:02-14-05/X:EST 2 WEEKS,/
/MO TO CONT:BY DEFENSE FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON:DPD HITE IS IN TRIAL/   /MO GRTD/X:PARTIES STIPULATE TO A NEW LAST DAY OF 02-14-05,/
/X:EST 2 WEEKS,/LD:12-30-04/
/CTORD: CASE PRETRIED AND TRIAL DATE CONFIRMED/NTW/LD:12-30-04 PER STIP/
/TEXT:TRANS TO DEPT 24/TRANS 24:FORTHWITH FOR PRETRIAL CONFERENCE//LD:12-30-04 PER STIPULATION/
/CONTD:12-03-04 #22 FOR TRIAL/X:LD IS 12-30-04 PER STIPULATION,/
/X: STAY LIFTED/
/X:STAY EXTENDED TO 11-30-04/LD:12-30-04 BY STIPULATION/
/CAL:PC 995 MOTION TO SET ASIDE THE INFORMATION/ARG&SUB/MO DENIED/GTW/
/TEXT DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAW/DEFTARR/NTW/LD 11-08-04/987,2/
/CAL:BIFURCATED PRELIMINARY HEARING/CONT/STWPX/DOP/
CONTD PRELIM HRG, DOP/CONTD:FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/STWPX/
CONTD PRELIM HRG, DOP/CONTD:FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/STWPX/
/CAL:TO SET/DOP/CONT/
BAIL REM $100,000
/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/STWPX/
